allow: Bash(git add scripts/install-persistent-runner.sh scripts/install-all-runners.sh scripts/setup-self-hosted-runner.sh runners.d/agentkit-forge.conf runners.d/README.md docs/setup.md)
Bash(az storage account show --name pvcprodtfstatesa --query "{name:name, resourceGroup:resourceGroup, location:primaryLocation}" -o tsv)
Bash(az storage account list --query "[].{name:name, rg:resourceGroup, location:primaryLocation}" -o table)
Bash(az storage container list --account-name pvctfstatef352fe78c963 --auth-mode login --query "[].name" -o tsv)

Bash(az role assignment list --scope "/subscriptions/22f9eb18-6553-4b7d-9451-47d0195085fe/resourceGroups/pvc-shared-tfstate-rg-san/providers/Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/pvctfstatef352fe78c963" --query "[].{principal:principalName, role:roleDefinitionName}" -o table)
Bash(az role assignment list --resource-group pvc-shared-tfstate-rg-san --query "[].{principal:principalName, role:roleDefinitionName}" -o table)
Bash(az ad sp show --id 8a2a0cab-b35e-4218-94ea-0b8ac79550e3 --query "{displayName:displayName, appId:appId}" -o tsv)
Bash(az resource list --resource-group pvc-prod-actionsrunner-rg-san --query "[].{name:name, type:type}" -o table)

Bash(az network nic show --resource-group pvc-prod-actionsrunner-rg-san --name prod-runner-listener-nic --query "ipConfigurations[0].{publicIp:publicIpAddress.id, subnet:subnet.id, nsg:networkSecurityGroup.id}" -o json)

Bash(az network nic show --resource-group pvc-prod-actionsrunner-rg-san --name prod-runner-listener-nic --query "{publicIpId:ipConfigurations[0].publicIpAddress.id, nsgId:networkSecurityGroup.id}" -o json)
Bash(az network public-ip list --resource-group pvc-prod-actionsrunner-rg-san --query "[].{name:name, ipAddress:ipAddress, associated:ipConfiguration.id}" -o table)
Bash(az network public-ip delete --resource-group pvc-prod-actionsrunner-rg-san --name prod-runner-listener-public-ip)

Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 terraform import -var="resource_group_name=$RG" -var="location=South Africa North" -var="runner_subnet_id=$SUBNET" -var="ssh_public_key=$SSH_KEY" azurerm_network_security_group.runner-nsg "/subscriptions/$SUB/resourceGroups/$RG/providers/Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups/prod-runner-nsg")

Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 terraform import -var="resource_group_name=$RG" -var="location=South Africa North" -var="runner_subnet_id=$SUBNET" -var="ssh_public_key=$SSH_KEY" azurerm_linux_virtual_machine.listener "/subscriptions/$SUB/resourceGroups/$RG/providers/Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines/prod-runner-listener")

Bash(az vm run-command invoke -g pvc-prod-actionsrunner-rg-san -n prod-runner-listener --command-id RunShellScript --scripts "systemctl is-active actions.runner.* 2>/dev/null || echo ''no runner service found''; ls /opt/gh-runner-*/svc.sh 2>/dev/null || echo ''no runner dirs''; ls /opt/gh-runner-justaghost/svc.sh 2>/dev/null && cd /opt/gh-runner-justaghost && sudo ./svc.sh status 2>&1 || echo ''no legacy runner''")
Bash(az vm show -g pvc-prod-actionsrunner-rg-san -n prod-runner-listener --query "hardwareProfile.vmSize" -o tsv)

Bash(az vm run-command invoke -g pvc-prod-actionsrunner-rg-san -n prod-runner-listener --command-id RunShellScript --scripts "nproc; free -h; cat /opt/gh-runner-justaghost/.runner 2>/dev/null | python3 -mjson.tool 2>/dev/null || cat /opt/gh-runner-justaghost/.runner 2>/dev/null")

Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 az vm run-command invoke -g pvc-prod-actionsrunner-rg-san -n prod-runner-listener --command-id RunShellScript --scripts 'if swapon --show | grep -q /swapfile; then echo ""Swap already active:""; swapon --show; free -h; exit 0; fi; fallocate -l 2G /swapfile && chmod 600 /swapfile && mkswap /swapfile && swapon /swapfile && echo ""/swapfile none swap sw 0 0"" >> /etc/fstab && echo ""Swap enabled:""; swapon --show; free -h')
